  1. org.key_project.prover.engine

Uses of Package
org.key_project.prover.engine

Packages that use org.key_project.prover.engine
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.control
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.action_history
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.caching
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.macros
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.macros
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init
This package contains classes handling prover initialisation.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io
Classes related to loading and saving proof files.
de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
This package contains classes implementing the proof search strategies of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.profile
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.ui
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util
This package is a grab bag of miscellaneous useful code fragments.
org.key_project.prover.engine
 
org.key_project.prover.engine.impl
 
  • Classes in org.key_project.prover.engine used by de.uka.ilkd.key.control
    Class
    Description
    ProofSearchInformation
    Represents a contract for gathering and accessing information about the application of a proof strategy during automated reasoning in the KeY system.
    ProverTaskListener
    Listener for longer tasks, which may be run in a separate worker thread.
    TaskFinishedInfo
    An interface that provides information about a task that has finished execution.
    TaskStartedInfo
    Represents information about a prover task that is about to start.
  • Classes in org.key_project.prover.engine used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
    Class
    Description
    ProverTaskListener
    Listener for longer tasks, which may be run in a separate worker thread.
    TaskFinishedInfo
    An interface that provides information about a task that has finished execution.
    TaskStartedInfo
    Represents information about a prover task that is about to start.

    Description
    GoalChooserFactory
    Interface to be implemented by builders returning a goal chooser.

    Class
    Description
    ProverTaskListener
    Listener for longer tasks, which may be run in a separate worker thread.
    TaskFinishedInfo
    An interface that provides information about a task that has finished execution.

    Represents information about a prover task that is about to start.
  • Classes in org.key_project.prover.engine used by de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl
    Class
    Description
    AbstractProverCore
    Common class for provers which takes care of listener registration and task event propagation.
    GoalChooser
    Interface to be implemented by classes in order to customize the goal selection strategy of the automatic prover environment.
    GoalChooserFactory
    Interface to be implemented by builders returning a goal chooser.
    ProverCore
    The ProverCore interface defines the core operations for managing and executing automated proof strategies in the KeY framework.
    TaskFinishedInfo
    An interface that provides information about a task that has finished execution.
    TaskStartedInfo
    Represents information about a prover task that is about to start.
    TaskStartedInfo.TaskKind
    Enumerates the kinds of tasks that can be represented.
  • Classes in org.key_project.prover.engine used by de.uka.ilkd.key.settings
    Class
    Description
    GoalChooser
    Interface to be implemented by classes in order to customize the goal selection strategy of the automatic prover environment.
    StopCondition
    Implementation of this interface can be used by implementations of ProverCore to determine if the strategy should stop or continue.
  • Classes in org.key_project.prover.engine used by de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
    Class
    Description
    StopCondition
    Implementation of this interface can be used by implementations of ProverCore to determine if the strategy should stop or continue.

    Class
    Description
    GoalChooserFactory
    Interface to be implemented by builders returning a goal chooser.
  • Classes in org.key_project.prover.engine used by de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy
    Class
    Description
    GoalChooser
    Interface to be implemented by classes in order to customize the goal selection strategy of the automatic prover environment.
    GoalChooserFactory
    Interface to be implemented by builders returning a goal chooser.
    SingleRuleApplicationInfo
    Represents information about the result of a single rule application in the KeY verification system.
    StopCondition
    Implementation of this interface can be used by implementations of ProverCore to determine if the strategy should stop or continue.

  • Classes in org.key_project.prover.engine used by org.key_project.prover.engine.impl
    Class
    Description
    AbstractProverCore
    Common class for provers which takes care of listener registration and task event propagation.
    GoalChooser
    Interface to be implemented by classes in order to customize the goal selection strategy of the automatic prover environment.
    ProofSearchInformation
    Represents a contract for gathering and accessing information about the application of a proof strategy during automated reasoning in the KeY system.
    ProverCore
    The ProverCore interface defines the core operations for managing and executing automated proof strategies in the KeY framework.
    SingleRuleApplicationInfo
    Represents information about the result of a single rule application in the KeY verification system.
    StopCondition
    Implementation of this interface can be used by implementations of ProverCore to determine if the strategy should stop or continue.
